message.content:
Explore the XPMotors iOS project's AI engineering assets comprehensively. I'm preparing team training materials that need to cover everything. Please find and catalog:

1. All files under `.ai-engineering/` — list each file with its purpose
2. All files under `.ai-knowledge/` — list each file and its role (modules, knowledge-points, pitfalls, specs, etc.)
3. All files under `.claude/skills/` — list each skill with its trigger keywords
4. All files under `.claude/rules/` — list each rule file
5. The CLAUDE.md at the project root
6. Any team guide or onboarding docs

For each category, note the file count and briefly what it covers. Be thorough — enumerate everything.

Thoroughness level: very thorough
